data.body: KEY DISCOVERY (stacked-review grounding): plan-review + completion gates ground against a SNAPSHOT of REBAR_GATE_REF (env) > [snapshot].ref > origin/main (see gate_source.py:69, config.current_code_root). By default = origin/main, so my STACK commits are invisible -> children referencing prior-stack symbols (e.g. #6 uses impact_fn from #1) get G6/T8 'symbol absent' BLOCKS. FIX: run each stacked child's review/claim/completion with REBAR_GATE_REF=<my stack tip SHA> (attested+signable), so the oracle grounds against the stack it builds on (= feature-branch review model). Use SAME ref for a child's review AND claim (verified_at_sha must match current at claim). Advance the ref as commits land. Also: my #6 trigger_likelihood desc edit initially FAILED (python assert aborted before write) — now fixed (5 occurrences on ticket). Re-reviewing #6 with REBAR_GATE_REF=HEAD now.
